channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The U.S.-Iran ceasefire grows more distant. And, Congress faces a consequential week
item.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. And, Congress returns from recess facing tight deadlines.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire over the weekend amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. And, Congress returns from recess facing tight deadlines.

(Image credit: Majid Saeedi)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Pythons' extreme biology may hold clues for treating human disease
item.description: These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shrink the size of their hearts and jump start their metabolism on a dime.
item.content:encoded:
These snakes can go for months without eating, grow and shrink the size of their hearts and jump start their metabolism on a dime.

(Image credit: Ari Daniel for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel

item.title: A guard punched him on camera. It was still nearly impossible for him to sue
item.description: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project.
item.content:encoded: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project.
item.dc:creator: Christie Thompson

item.title: He was having a mental health crisis. Memphis task force agents came and shot him
item.description: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force.
item.content:encoded:
Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force.

(Image credit: Luke Sharrett for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim

item.title: EV battery recycling has a math problem
item.description: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve.
item.content:encoded: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve.
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Eat your ice cream for a long, healthy life? This doctor says so
item.description: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, takes on the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing good health.
item.content:encoded:
Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, takes on the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing good health.

(Image credit: WeBond Creations)
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: The U.S. strikes Iran for a third weekend as Iran retaliates by hitting Gulf nations, Sen. Lindsey Graham died Saturday at the age of 71, Congress returns from recess this week.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. strikes Iran for a third weekend as Iran retaliates by hitting Gulf nations, Sen. Lindsey Graham died Saturday at the age of 71, Congress returns from recess this week.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Jubilee Media helps politicians connect with young people through viral debate videos
item.description: Jubilee Media produces some of the most watched content on YouTube. That includes the show "Surrounded," which has increasingly become a stop for politicians hoping to make inroads with young viewers.
item.content:encoded: Jubilee Media produces some of the most watched content on YouTube. That includes the show "Surrounded," which has increasingly become a stop for politicians hoping to make inroads with young viewers.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore

item.title: Sam Neill, known for 'Jurassic Park' and 'The Piano,' dies at 78, his family says
item.description: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page.
item.content:encoded:
In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page.

(Image credit: Richard Shotwell/AP Photo)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: McConnell says a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.
item.content:encoded:
Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.

(Image credit: Mark Humphrey)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
